acet.title: Macroeconomic Policies Supporting Start-ups in Africa
acet.excerpt: E-commerce start-ups face costly customs duties on cross-border  shipments, discouraging trade expansion. Agritech start-ups require access to farm equipment and  irrigation systems that are often imported, but tariffs make these products expensive. This increases  production costs, limits competitiveness, and slows down innovation (Daum et al., 2024; AGRA, 2024).
